message:
feat(ui): replace silent analytics query failures with structured error tracking

- Refactor load_chart_data() to use match expressions instead of if-let-Ok
  patterns, so analytics query failures are logged and tracked rather than
  silently swallowed
- Introduce try_analytics! macro for consistent error handling across all
  analytics breakdown/timeseries/scalar queries
- Accumulate per-query errors in a load_errors Vec so callers can surface
  partial-load diagnostics to the user
- First query (agent token breakdown) converted to explicit match block;
  remaining ~15 queries use the try_analytics! macro for uniformity
- Wire error-aware analytics loading through the app UI layer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
